synthesis: Latin American indie football creators are trapped in a 60-90 minute manual research loop across fragmented sources — the design space is a razor-sharp creator tool that collapses data aggregation, visual card generation, and viral anomaly detection into a single workflow priced below $20/month, distributed where creators already live (Twitter, TikTok, web).

solution_options.anchored_to_problem: Generación manual de tarjetas de estadísticas virales: 60+ minutos por pieza, zero automatización
solution_options.approach: A CLI tool (installable via npm or a single binary) that accepts a Spanish-language prompt like 'Riquelme vs Zidane Champions League' and returns a ready-to-publish PNG card in under 90 seconds.
key_features: Spanish NLP parser for natural-language prompts
3 pre-built card templates rendered via SVG-to-PNG
Local config file for creator branding
solution_options.why_it_wins: Compresses the entire workflow into a single command with zero UI friction.
main_risks: Spanish NLP entity extraction fails on ambiguous names

solution_options.option_name: GolazoAPI — REST Backend for Indie Latin Football Creators
solution_options.anchored_to_problem: No herramienta de acceso unificado a datos de fútbol para creadores indie latinoamericanos
solution_options.approach: A hosted REST API that aggregates API-Football and AFA historical data into clean endpoints priced at $15/month for creators.
key_features: AFA Primera División historical data from 1995
solution_options.why_it_wins: Priced and documented for a creator, not a CTO. Spanish-first documentation is a moat.
main_risks: Low retention if creators need to write code
Race to the bottom on price

solution_options.option_name: ViralStat Engine — Daily Anomaly Feed for Football Creators
solution_options.anchored_to_problem: Ausencia de motor de descubrimiento de 'datos virales': los creadores no saben qué estadísticas van a explotar
solution_options.approach: A daily digest service (email + Telegram bot) that runs statistical anomaly detection every morning and surfaces 5-10 viral candidates to creators.
key_features: Nightly cron with Z-score anomaly detection
solution_options.why_it_wins: Creators need a scout. This runs overnight and lands in their inbox before they wake up.
main_risks: Quality of anomaly detection determines trust
Creators may share instead of paying
mvp_cut: Drop LLM one-liners — use 5 static templates

solution_options.anchored_to_problem: No herramienta de acceso unificado a datos de fútbol para creadores indie latinoamericanos
solution_options.approach: A Notion integration that auto-populates stat columns in a creator's content calendar from API-Football data.
key_features: Notion integration with player/team NLP detection
solution_options.why_it_wins: Lives inside the app 65% of LATAM creators already use. No behavior change required.

solution_options.option_name: BDFA Resurrector — Historical LATAM Football Data API
solution_options.anchored_to_problem: Datos históricos de fútbol latinoamericano (AFA, Libertadores, historia pre-2000) fragmentados e inaccesibles para creadores
solution_options.approach: Scrape, clean, and expose BDFA's historical AFA player and match records as a public REST API. SQLite + Go on Fly.io, under $5/month infra.
key_features: AFA match results from 1931 to present
Player career records in Argentine football
Libertadores and Copa Argentina historical results
solution_options.why_it_wins: Monopoly on AFA history before 2000. No competing API covers this.

solution_options.option_name: PromptCard SaaS — Web App for Viral Football Cards in Spanish
solution_options.anchored_to_problem: Generación manual de tarjetas de estadísticas virales: 60+ minutos por pieza, zero automatización
solution_options.approach: A web app where a creator types a comparison in Spanish, sees a live preview, and downloads a ready-to-post PNG. No install, no CLI. Puppeteer server-side rendering.
solution_options.why_it_wins: Zero technical barrier. Watermark creates viral loop: every shared card is acquisition.
main_risks: Puppeteer slow at scale and expensive
mvp_cut: Drop autocomplete — manual exact name entry

shortlist.rationale: Directly eliminates the highest-severity pain (60+ min per card) with a single-command workflow, ships in 10 days with no external infra dependencies.

shortlist.option_name: ViralStat Engine — Daily Anomaly Feed for Football Creators
shortlist.rationale: Newsletter paywall model is the clearest monetization path. Buildable in 8 days solo. Solves the viral discovery problem creators actively feel.

shortlist.option_name: PromptCard SaaS — Web App for Viral Football Cards in Spanish
shortlist.rationale: Highest total addressable reach, zero technical skills required from creators, watermark viral loop makes it self-distributing.
